title: Gem Slaw Savory Delight
description: A refreshing slaw made with crunchy gem lettuce, savory slaw, and a hint of little gem's sweetness.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine gem lettuce, savory slaw, and little gem.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar and olive oil.
3. Pour the dressing over the slaw mixture and toss to coat.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
6. Just before serving, give the slaw a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
